assets.name: Curie Logo White
assets.description: Curie C logomark — stylized letter C with curved notch and extending tail, white filled
assets.context: Sidebar navigation logo, always visible at top of side-nav

assets.name: Curie Logo White (Large)
assets.description: Larger version of the Curie C logomark, white filled, same swirl shape without clip-path
assets.context: Available for marketing materials, splash screens, or larger branding placements

assets.name: Home Icon
assets.description: House icon with peaked roof and rectangular door cutout, white stroked outline
assets.context: Alternative home icon for sidebar navigation (inline SVG version used instead)

assets.name: Brief Icon
assets.description: Rounded square with three horizontal text lines inside, representing medical briefs and articles
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Briefs section (inactive state)

assets.name: Podcast Icon
assets.description: Headphones icon with over-ear cups and connecting headband arc, white stroked outline
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Podcasts section (inactive state)

assets.name: Game Icon
assets.description: Game controller with D-pad on left and two circular buttons on right, white stroked outline
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Games section (inactive state)

assets.name: Newsletter Icon
assets.description: Envelope/mail icon with rectangular body and V-shaped flap line, white stroked outline
assets.context: Sidebar navigation icon for the Newsletter section (inactive state)

assets.name: Media / Editorial Icon
assets.description: Microphone with radiating sound lines, ear cup, and circular knob — represents media/broadcast with gradient fills (teal to pink to purple)
assets.context: Page header icon for the Editorial section, displayed next to 'Curie Editorial' title

assets.name: Curie Brief Section Icon
assets.description: Brief-related icon inside a pill/capsule-shaped rounded rect, used for Briefs section headers
assets.context: Page header icon for the Briefs section, displayed next to 'Curie Brief' title

assets.name: Podcast Section Icon
assets.description: Podcast-themed icon with equalizer bars inside a square frame (embedded raster)
assets.context: Page header icon for the Podcasts section

assets.name: Email Sign Up Banner Icon
assets.description: Envelope icon inside a rounded rectangle with gradient border (white to dark blue)
assets.context: Newsletter signup banner decoration, alternative to inline envelope SVG

assets.name: Down Arrow
assets.description: Downward-pointing chevron arrow for downvote/dislike interactions
assets.context: Brief card and detail page voting control — downvote button

assets.name: Up Arrow
assets.description: Upward-pointing chevron arrow for upvote/like interactions
assets.context: Brief card and detail page voting control — upvote button

assets.name: Bookmark Icon
assets.description: Bookmark ribbon icon with pointed bottom tab, light gray filled
assets.context: Save/bookmark action on brief cards and detail pages

assets.name: History Icon
assets.description: Clock with counter-clockwise arrow representing history/recently viewed
assets.context: Recently viewed briefs filter or history toggle

assets.name: Full Screen Icon
assets.description: Four corner brackets forming a fullscreen/expand icon
assets.context: Podcast player fullscreen toggle button

assets.name: Star Sparkle
assets.description: Two four-pointed sparkle/star shapes with gradient fills (pink to white to purple), decorative element
assets.context: Decorative sparkle for signup/onboarding flows

assets.name: Games Illustration
assets.description: Games-themed illustration with abstract geometric shapes and gradient elements (embedded raster)
assets.context: Game card decoration and home page games section visual

assets.name: Connections Illustration
assets.description: Interconnected nodes and network-like design illustration (embedded raster at 78% opacity)
assets.context: Game card visual showing connected network/puzzle theme

assets.name: Curie Strands Illustration
assets.description: Abstract DNA/strand-like shapes illustration representing the Strands word game (embedded raster)
assets.context: Strands game card visual decoration

assets.name: Mental Healthcare Illustration
assets.description: Mental healthcare themed illustration with multiple human figures and gradient elements (embedded raster)
assets.context: Available for mental health content sections or articles

assets.name: Podcast Illustration
assets.description: Person wearing headphones at recording desk with microphone, scissors (editing metaphor), concentric arcs, sparkle — podcast/recording scene in blue-purple gradients
assets.context: Available for podcast section hero or feature areas

assets.name: Medical Podcast Illustration
assets.description: Cassette tape/boombox with audio waveform bars, connecting wires, play button — retro medical audio player in blue-purple gradients
assets.context: Available for podcast player decoration or audio content sections

assets.name: Curie Podcast Illustration
assets.description: Robotic arm/turntable with globe/lens head, film strip, pendulum elements — stylized media production scene in teal, pink, and blue gradients
assets.context: Available for podcast feature or production content areas

assets.name: Curie Podcast Signup Illustration
assets.description: Podcast-themed illustration for sign-up page (embedded raster)
assets.context: Signup/onboarding flow decoration for podcast subscription

assets.name: Home Footer Illustration
assets.description: Person with headphones at recording desk — same scene as podcast illustration, used in home page footer section
assets.context: Home page footer decoration, large visual above copyright

assets.name: Envelope Icon (inline)
assets.description: Email envelope with V-shaped flap, stroked outline — used in top notification banner
assets.context: Top banner newsletter signup prompt icon
